patch.value:
## Context

File: src/core/telemetry/runtime.ts:41-52 — 9 env-var constants defined.
File: src/core/telemetry/consent.ts:7 — PM_TELEMETRY_PROMPT env.
File: src/cli/commands/health.ts:1213-1217 — env_overrides surfaced in health but only 3 of 9 vars.

Valid PM_TELEMETRY_SOURCE_CONTEXT values are 'user|automation|test|dogfood|audit_smoke' (runtime.ts:52) — this enum is not documented outside the source.

## Acceptance criteria

- AGENT_GUIDE.md (or docs/commands/TELEMETRY.md if it exists) lists all env-var knobs with their valid values, interaction rules, and example usage.
- health check env_overrides section is extended to also surface PM_TELEMETRY_SOURCE_CONTEXT override and PM_TELEMETRY_INLINE_FLUSH states for completeness.
- A unit test asserts that all PM_TELEMETRY_SOURCE_CONTEXT_VALUES appear in the documentation file (or in a dedicated const exported for docs).

## Evidence

src/core/telemetry/runtime.ts:41-52 — all env constants.
No single .md or help string lists them all together.
Document and test telemetry env-var surface: PM_TELEMETRY_DISABLED, PM_NO_TELEMETRY, PM_TELEMETRY_SOURCE_CONTEXT, PM_TELEMETRY_OTEL_DISABLED, PM_TELEMETRY_INLINE_FLUSH

The telemetry module exposes 9 env-var knobs (runtime.ts lines 41-52, consent.ts line 7) that control disable, source context override, OTel integration, and flush mode. These are not listed in any single user-facing document or help text, and their interaction (e.g. PM_TELEMETRY_DISABLED vs PM_NO_TELEMETRY are aliases; PM_TELEMETRY_SOURCE_CONTEXT is an override-only env) is scattered across the code. Agents relying on PM_TELEMETRY_SOURCE_CONTEXT=dogfood have no spec reference for the valid values or interaction rules.
All telemetry env vars documented in a single reference section; health env_overrides extended; docs-enum test present.

- AGENT_GUIDE.md (or docs/commands/TELEMETRY.md if it exists) lists all env-var knobs with their valid values, interaction rules, and example usage.
- health check env_overrides section is extended to also surface PM_TELEMETRY_SOURCE_CONTEXT override and PM_TELEMETRY_INLINE_FLUSH states for completeness.
- A unit test asserts that all PM_TELEMETRY_SOURCE_CONTEXT_VALUES appear in the documentation file (or in a dedicated const exported for docs).
